task: Investigate the associations between blood volatile organic compound (VOC) levels and airflow obstruction among U.S. adults using NHANES 2007-2012 data. The analysis should: (1) screen blood VOC concentrations (measured by headspace solid-phase microextraction/gas chromatography/isotope dilution mass spectrometry) and identify compounds with detection frequency >= 10% among 41 measured blood VOCs; (2) classify participants by airflow obstruction status using pre-bronchodilator spirometry (FEV1/FVC < 0.70) and further distinguish non-reversible obstruction (post-bronchodilator FEV1/FVC < 0.70) from reversible obstruction (post-bronchodilator FEV1/FVC >= 0.70) consistent with GOLD criteria; (3) estimate adjusted odds ratios for the association between each qualifying blood VOC (log-transformed) and non-reversible and reversible airflow obstruction using survey-weighted multivariable logistic regression adjusting for age, poverty income ratio, BMI, pack-years of smoking (log-transformed), sex, race/ethnicity, current/past smoking, environmental tobacco smoke exposure, and physical activity; (4) test for effect modification by smoking status using interaction terms; (5) conduct sensitivity analyses excluding current smokers. The study population includes adults aged 20 years and older with valid pre- and post-bronchodilator spirometry and blood VOC measurements across three pooled NHANES cycles (2007-2008, 2009-2010, 2011-2012). All analyses must account for the complex survey design of NHANES (sampling weights, PSU, strata) and use appropriate 6-year combined weights.

data.name: NHANES 2007-2012 Demographics (3 cycles)
data.description: Demographic variables from DEMO_E, DEMO_F, and DEMO_G including age, sex, race/ethnicity, education, poverty income ratio. Combined across 3 cycles.

data.name: NHANES 2007-2012 Spirometry — Pre and Post-Bronchodilator (3 cycles)
data.description: Pre-bronchodilator and post-bronchodilator spirometry from SPX_E, SPX_F, SPX_G including FEV1, FVC, FEV1/FVC, quality grades. Post-bronchodilator testing performed on participants with baseline obstruction.

data.name: NHANES 2007-2012 Blood Volatile Organic Compounds (3 cycles)
data.description: Blood concentrations of 41 VOCs measured by headspace SPME-GC-IDMS. Includes xylenes, styrene, toluene, benzene, chloroform, bromodichloromethane, dibromochloromethane, and other compounds. Subsample with special weights.

data.name: NHANES 2007-2012 Smoking and Cotinine (3 cycles)
data.description: Smoking questionnaire (SMQ_E/F/G) for current/past smoking status and pack-years; serum cotinine (COT_E/F/G) for environmental tobacco smoke exposure assessment.

data.name: NHANES 2007-2012 Body Measures and Physical Activity (3 cycles)
data.description: Body measures (BMX_E/F/G) for BMI calculation; physical activity questionnaire (PAQ_E/F/G) for activity level covariates.

data.name: Variable Codebook
data.description: Complete variable definitions, value labels, and survey design notes for all NHANES 2007-2012 components used in this analysis.

primary_methods: non-reversible vs reversible airflow obstruction classification
